title: Vietnamese Style Fish Noodle Soup
description: A light and flavorful noodle soup made with fresh fish and a blend of Vietnamese spices.

ingredients.name: Fish
ingredients.notes: white fish such as tilapia or catfish works well

ingredients.name: Mildly Bitter Melon
ingredients.notes: such as bitter melon or eggplant

instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Cut the fish into small pieces and season with salt and black pepper.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat and add 1 tablespoon of oil.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the fish to the skillet and cook until opaque and flaked with a fork, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the soy sauce and fish sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the sliced bitter melon and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with lime wedges.
